welcome.title: Lead Management
welcome.description:
This is where you manage all potential customers coming to your dealership from the web, social media, or in person.

Let's see how it works.

statusCards.title: Lead Status
statusCards.description:
Quick view of how many leads you have in each state: pending, contacted, in follow-up, etc.

Click a card to filter and see only leads in that state.

tabs.title: Buy / Sell Leads
tabs.description:
Organize your leads into two categories:

Buy: Customers wanting to sell or consign their vehicle with you
Sell: Customers interested in buying a vehicle

You can also create a new lead manually and switch between table and kanban views.

filters.title: Filters & Search
filters.description:
Find leads quickly:

Search by customer name or email
Filter by lead type or status

Use the 'Clear' button to reset all filters.

content.title: Lead List
content.description:
Here you see all your leads with contact info, type, associated vehicle, and status.

Click any lead to see its full details and manage it. You can change the status directly from the table.

finish.title: All Set!
finish.description: You now know the lead management tools. Responding quickly to pending leads is key to closing more sales.
